title: Two New EnviThan Gas Upgrading Plants for Loick Bioenergie GmbH
content: Loick Bioenergie GmbH is expanding its portfolio with not one, but two new EnviThan gas upgrading plants. The EnviTec Biogas customer operates a total of 40 biogas and photovoltaic projects across Germany. As an experienced plant manufacturer and operator, EnviTec Biogas AG has been commissioned to construct a gas upgrading plant at each of the companyâ€™s existing biogas plants in Hennstedt, Schleswig-Holstein, and Heiligengrabe, Brandenburg.
author: Analysts Account
